revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-44

Some VTS organisations may require the appointment of a manager to administer and interface with regional or port management authorities.

In such circumstances the manager should possess managerial qualifications to the satisfaction of the Competent Authority.
	

(VTS33/output/8 refers) 

{{languages|VTS Manager}}
